sql-case.value:
WITH finance_all_info_orc_base AS (
SELECT column1, column2, column86, column107, column102
FROM (
SELECT *
FROM finance_all_info_orc_tmp
) base
JOIN (
SELECT DISTINCT monthid, fmonthid
FROM dim_fiscal_day
WHERE fmonthid >= '202101'
AND fmonthid = '202401'
) t_day
ON base.column2 = t_day.monthid
),
bonus AS (
SELECT column1, column2 AS monthid, '1' AS flag
, sum(if(sx_fmonthid <= CAST(CAST('202401' AS int) - 100 AS string), column85, 0)) AS c_86
FROM dm_ehr_annual_bonus_info
WHERE 1 = 1
AND fmonthid = CAST(CAST('202401' AS int) - 100 AS string)
GROUP BY column1, column2
UNION ALL
SELECT column1, column2 AS monthid, '0' AS flag
, sum(if(sx_fmonthid <= '202401', column85, 0)) AS c_86
FROM dm_ehr_annual_bonus_info
WHERE 1 = 1
AND fmonthid = '202401'
GROUP BY column1, column2
),
ry AS (
SELECT if(f_month = '202401', '0', '1') AS flag
, emplid, empl_rcd, effdt, effseq, xdf_name
, hr_status, action, action_reason, position_nbr, descr_position
, xdf_pos_descrshort, company, x_company_to, topcomanydescr, org_type
, org_type_descr, xdf_company_descr, xdf_com_descrshort, business_unit, business_descr
, deptid, dept_descr, xdf_dep_descrshort, jobcode, jobcode_descr
, empl_class, xdf_empl_type, xdf_empl_type_descr, supv_lvl_id, xdf_job6
, xdf_job_zhiji, sex, highest_educ_lvl, mar_status, email_addr
, birthdate, xdf_age_num, birthplace, xdf_join_dt, xdf_join_year
, national_id_type, national_id, country_descr, descr, xdf_year_month
, xdf_year, xdf_property, xdf_ywx, xdf_is_tal, xdf_is_sp_con
, xdf_sp_sch, xdf_ywx_a, xdf_ywx_sub, xdf_job1, lastupddttm
, xdf_hour, xdf_year_month1, xdf_is_edu_lev_h, xdf_is_outside, xdf_is_985211
, xdf_is_normal_sch, xdf_is_specail_sch, xdf_stand_deptid, xdf_dept_descr, xdf_dept_descr2
, xdf_dept_descr3, xdf_dept_descr4, xdf_dept_descr5, xdf_dept_descr6, xdf_code_descr1
, xdf_code_descr1_lv1, xdf_code_descr1_lv2, xdf_code_descr1_lv3, xdf_code_descr2, xdf_code_descr3
, xdf_code_descr4, xdf_deptshort1, xdf_deptshort2, xdf_deptshort3, xdf_deptshort4
, xdf_deptshort5, xdf_deptshort6, xdf_empl_type_n, xdf_empl_type_n_descr, xdf_deptid1
, xdf_deptid2, xdf_deptid3, xdf_deptid4, xdf_deptid5, xdf_deptid6
, xdf_descr, f_month, fquarterid, xdf_empl_type_new, xdf_empl_type_new_descr
, row_num, is_on_job, is_male, is_famale_cnt, is_sex_unknow
, is_full_time, is_excel, is_full_time_teacher, is_full_time_staff, is_part_time_teacher
, is_part_time_staff, is_seniority_more_1y, is_late_age, is_teacher_excel, key_post_cnt
, is_key_post_cnt_yiguan, is_key_post_cnt_ersanguan, is_key_post_cnt_teacher, is_seniority_less_1y_cnt, is_teacher_less_1y
, is_staff_excel, is_staff_less_1y, is_late_age95, is_new_teacher, is_new_teacher_excel
, is_full_time_teacher_turnover, is_full_time_teacher_turnover_1y, is_full_time_staff_turnover, is_part_time_teacher_turnover, is_part_time_staff_turnover
, is_key_post_turnover, is_key_post_turnover_yiguan, is_key_post_turnover_ersanguan, is_key_post_turnover_teacher, is_teacher_less_1y_turnover
, is_teacher_excel_turnover, is_staff_excel_turnover, is_staff_less_1y_turnover, is_short_labor, json_all
FROM (
SELECT *
, CASE
WHEN xdf_join_year < 0.25 THEN '1'
WHEN xdf_join_year < 0.5 THEN '2'
WHEN xdf_join_year < 1 THEN '3'
WHEN xdf_join_year >= 1
AND xdf_join_year < 2
THEN '4'
WHEN xdf_join_year >= 2
AND xdf_join_year < 3
THEN '5'
WHEN xdf_join_year >= 3
AND xdf_join_year < 4
THEN '6'
WHEN xdf_join_year >= 4
AND xdf_join_year < 5
THEN '7'
WHEN xdf_join_year >= 5
AND xdf_join_year < 6
THEN '8'
WHEN xdf_join_year >= 6
AND xdf_join_year < 7
THEN '9'
WHEN xdf_join_year >= 7
AND xdf_join_year < 8
THEN '10'
WHEN xdf_join_year >= 8
AND xdf_join_year < 9
THEN '11'
WHEN xdf_join_year >= 9
AND xdf_join_year < 10
THEN '12'
WHEN xdf_join_year >= 10 THEN '13'
END AS company_age
FROM dws_ehr_ps_xdf_em_ym_info t_base
WHERE f_month >= '202101'
AND row_num = 1
AND is_on_job = '1' -- and xdf_empl_type = 'A'
AND (f_month = '202401'
OR f_month = CAST(CAST('202401' AS int) - 100 AS string))
) base
WHERE 1 = 1
AND supv_lvl_id NOT IN ('A', 'B', 'E')
),
line AS (
SELECT info.emplid, info.xdf_year_month AS month, info.project AS business_line, 1 AS ratio
FROM dm_ehr_excellent_education_info info
),
wd AS (
SELECT ehr_org_id, ehr_org_name, org_type, org_type_name, org_size_sy
, org_size_name_sy, org_size_gm, org_size_name_gm, org_id_one, org_name_one AS org_id_name_one
FROM dim_ehr_finance_org_relation_upload
)
SELECT org_type_name AS "机构类型", org_size_name_sy AS "机构板块" -- 机构类型
, org_size_name_gm AS "对标规模" -- 板块
, org_id_name_one AS "一级机构" -- 规模
, company AS "机构短描述" -- 一级机构
, 业务分类 -- 机构
, 项目, xdf_deptshort1 AS "一级部门短描述" -- 业务分类
, px_jglx -- 一级部门
, px_sy, px_gm, px, px_ywfl, curr_avg AS "教师月均薪酬平均值-本期"
, pre_avg AS "教师月均薪酬平均值-同期", tb_avg AS "教师月均薪酬平均值-同比", curr_perecentile AS "教师月均薪酬中位值-本期", per_perecentile AS "教师月均薪酬中位值-同期", tb_perecentile AS "教师月均薪酬中位值-同比"
, curr_perecentile_25 AS "教师月均薪酬25分位值-本期", per_perecentile_25 AS "教师月均薪酬25分位值-同期", tb_perecentile_25 AS "教师月均薪酬25分位值-同比", curr_perecentile_75 AS "教师月均薪酬75分位值-本期", per_perecentile_75 AS "教师月均薪酬75分位值-同期"
, tb_perecentile_75 AS "教师月均薪酬75分位值-同比", all_people AS "总人数", all_people_0_5 AS "月均薪酬分布-人数（5K及以下)", all_people_5_10 AS "月均薪酬分布-人数[5k-10k)", all_people_10_15 AS "月均薪酬分布-人数[10k-15k)"
, all_people_15_20 AS "月均薪酬分布-人数[15k-20k)", all_people_20 AS "月均薪酬分布-人数（20k及以上)", all_people_0_5_ratio AS "月均薪酬分布-人数占比（5K及以下)", all_people_5_10_ratio AS "月均薪酬分布-人数占比[5k-10k)", all_people_10_15_ratio AS "月均薪酬分布-人数占比[10k-15k)"
, all_people_15_20_ratio AS "月均薪酬分布-人数占比[15k-20k)", all_people_20_ratio AS "月均薪酬分布-人数占比（20k及以上)"
FROM (
SELECT org_type_name, org_size_name_sy -- 机构类型
, org_size_name_gm -- 板块
, org_id_name_one -- 规模
, company -- 一级机构
, 业务分类 -- 机构
, 项目, xdf_deptshort1 -- 项目
, CASE
WHEN org_type_name = '培训学校' THEN 2
WHEN org_type_name = '产业机构' THEN 3
WHEN org_type_name = '总公司' THEN 4
ELSE 5
END AS px_jglx, px_sy, px_gm, px, 999 AS px_ywfl
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, 0)) AS curr_avg
, sum(if(curr_pre = '1', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1', ratio, 0)) AS pre_avg
, (sum(if(curr_pre = '0', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, 0)) - sum(if(curr_pre = '1', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1', ratio, 0))) / (sum(if(curr_pre = '1', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1', ratio, 0))) AS tb_avg
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, NULL)) AS curr_perecentile
, sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, NULL)) AS per_perecentile
, (sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, 0)) - sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, 0))) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, 0)) AS tb_perecentile
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, NULL)) AS curr_perecentile_25
, sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, NULL)) AS per_perecentile_25
, (sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, 0)) - sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, 0))) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, 0)) AS tb_perecentile_25
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, NULL)) AS curr_perecentile_75
, sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, NULL)) AS per_perecentile_75
, (sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, 0)) - sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, 0))) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, 0)) AS tb_perecentile_75
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg < 5000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_0_5
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 5 * 1000
AND every_avg < 10 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_5_10
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 10 * 1000
AND every_avg < 15 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_10_15
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 15 * 1000
AND every_avg < 20 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_15_20
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 20 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_20
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg < 5000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_0_5_ratio
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 5 * 1000
AND every_avg < 10 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_5_10_ratio
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 10 * 1000
AND every_avg < 15 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_10_15_ratio
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 15 * 1000
AND every_avg < 20 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_15_20_ratio
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 20 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_20_ratio
FROM (
SELECT org_type_name, org_size_name_sy -- 机构类型
, org_size_name_gm -- 板块
, org_id_name_one -- 规模
, company -- 一级机构
, 业务分类 -- 机构
, 项目, xdf_deptshort1 -- 项目
, curr_pre -- 一级部门
, t_base.px, px_sy, px_gm, column1, ratio
, every_avg, rn, max(rn) OVER (PARTITION BY org_type_name, org_size_name_sy, org_size_name_gm, org_id_name_one, company, 业务分类, 项目, xdf_deptshort1, curr_pre ORDER BY every_avg DESC) AS max_rn
FROM (
SELECT if(1 = 2, '全部', org_type_name) AS org_type_name
, if(1 = 2, '全部', org_size_name_sy) AS org_size_name_sy
, if(1 = 2, '全部', org_size_name_gm) AS org_size_name_gm
, if(1 = 2, '全部', org_id_name_one) AS org_id_name_one
, if(1 = 2, '全部', t_base.company_desc) AS company
, if(1 = 2, '全部', t_base.业务分类) AS 业务分类
, if(1 = 2, '全部', t_base.xdf_deptshort1) AS xdf_deptshort1
, if(1 = 2, '全部', t_base.business_line) AS 项目
, curr_pre -- 项目
, if(1 = 2, 0, px) AS px
, if(1 = 2, 0, px_sy) AS px_sy
, if(1 = 2, 0, px_gm) AS px_gm -- 规模
, column1, sum(ratio) / count(DISTINCT column2) AS ratio
, sum((column107 + ifnull(if(人员分类 = '教师'
AND t_base.company_desc IN ('北京学校', '国际教育北京中心'), column102, c_86), 0)) * ratio) / sum(ratio) AS every_avg
, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY if(1 = 2, '全部', org_type_name), if(1 = 2, '全部', org_size_name_sy), if(1 = 2, '全部', org_size_name_gm), if(1 = 2, '全部', org_id_name_one), if(1 = 2, '全部', t_base.company_desc), if(1 = 2, '全部', t_base.业务分类), if(1 = 2, '全部', t_base.xdf_deptshort1), if(1 = 2, '全部', t_base.business_line), if(1 = 2, 0, px), if(1 = 2, 0, px_sy), if(1 = 2, 0, px_gm), curr_pre ORDER BY sum((column107 + ifnull(if(人员分类 = '教师'
AND t_base.company_desc IN ('北京学校', '国际教育北京中心'), column102, c_86), 0)) * ratio) / sum(ratio)) AS rn
FROM (
SELECT base.*, wd.org_type_name, wd.org_size_name_sy -- 机构类型
, wd.org_size_name_gm -- 板块
, wd.org_id_name_one -- 规模
, wd.ehr_org_name AS company_desc
, CASE
WHEN topcomanydescr = '集团总公司' THEN '集团总公司'
WHEN topcomanydescr = '前途出国' THEN '前途出国'
ELSE '其他'
END AS "业务分类"
, CASE
WHEN xdf_code_descr1_lv3 = '人员挂靠' THEN '挂靠'
WHEN xdf_code_descr1_lv3 = '运营' THEN '运营'
ELSE '其他'
END AS "人员分类"
, CASE
WHEN xdf_code_descr1_lv3 = '咨询顾问' THEN '咨询顾问'
ELSE '其他'
END AS "人员分类下钻", 1 AS 项目
, if(t_px.px IS NULL, 999, t_px.px) AS px
, if(t_px_sy.px IS NULL, 999, t_px_sy.px) AS px_sy
, if(t_px_gm.px IS NULL, 999, t_px_gm.px) AS px_gm
FROM (
SELECT base.*, ry.*, '0' AS curr_pre, line.business_line
, ifnull(line.ratio, 1) AS ratio, bonus.c_86
FROM finance_all_info_orc_base base
JOIN (
SELECT *
FROM ry
WHERE flag = '0'
) ry
ON base.column2 = ry.xdf_year_month
AND base.column1 = ry.emplid
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT *
FROM bonus
WHERE flag = '0'
) bonus
ON ry.xdf_year_month = bonus.monthid
AND ry.emplid = bonus.column1
LEFT JOIN line
ON ry.emplid = line.emplid
AND ry.xdf_year_month = line.month
UNION ALL
SELECT base.*, ry.*, '1' AS curr_pre, line.business_line
, ifnull(line.ratio, 1) AS ratio, bonus.c_86
FROM finance_all_info_orc_base base
JOIN (
SELECT *
FROM ry
WHERE flag = '1'
) ry
ON base.column2 = ry.xdf_year_month
AND base.column1 = ry.emplid
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT *
FROM bonus
WHERE flag = '1'
) bonus
ON ry.xdf_year_month = bonus.monthid
AND ry.emplid = bonus.column1
LEFT JOIN line
ON ry.emplid = line.emplid
AND ry.xdf_year_month = line.month
) base
JOIN wd ON base.company = wd.ehr_org_id
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT name, px
FROM dim_ehr_all_dimension_dict
WHERE type = '6'
) t_px
ON wd.org_id_name_one = t_px.name
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT name, px
FROM dim_ehr_all_dimension_dict
WHERE type = '7'
) t_px_sy
ON wd.org_size_name_sy = t_px_sy.name
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT name, px
FROM dim_ehr_all_dimension_dict
WHERE type = '7'
) t_px_gm
ON wd.org_size_name_gm = t_px_gm.name
) t_base
WHERE t_base.人员分类下钻 NOT IN ('机构中高管', '总公司高管')
GROUP BY if(1 = 2, '全部', org_type_name) -- 机构类型
, if(1 = 2, '全部', org_size_name_sy) -- 板块
, if(1 = 2, '全部', org_size_name_gm) -- 规模
, if(1 = 2, '全部', org_id_name_one) -- 一级机构
, if(1 = 2, '全部', t_base.company_desc), if(1 = 2, '全部', t_base.业务分类), if(1 = 2, '全部', t_base.xdf_deptshort1), if(1 = 2, '全部', t_base.business_line), if(1 = 2, 0, px), if(1 = 2, 0, px_sy) -- 板块
, if(1 = 2, 0, px_gm), curr_pre, column1
) t_base
) t_base
GROUP BY org_type_name -- 机构类型
, org_size_name_sy -- 板块
, org_size_name_gm -- 规模
, org_id_name_one -- 一级机构
, company -- 机构
, 业务分类, 项目 -- 项目
, xdf_deptshort1 -- 一级部门
, px, px_sy, px_gm
UNION ALL
SELECT '合计' AS org_type_name, '合计' AS org_size_name_sy, '合计' AS org_size_name_gm, '合计' AS org_id_name_one, '合计' AS company
, '合计' AS 业务分类, '合计' AS 项目, '合计' AS xdf_deptshort1, 0 AS px_jglx, 0 AS px_sy
, 0 AS px_gm, 0 AS px, 0 AS px_ywfl
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, 0)) AS curr_avg
, sum(if(curr_pre = '1', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1', ratio, 0)) AS pre_avg
, (sum(if(curr_pre = '0', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, 0)) - sum(if(curr_pre = '1', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1', ratio, 0))) / (sum(if(curr_pre = '1', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1', ratio, 0))) AS tb_avg
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, NULL)) AS curr_perecentile
, sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, NULL)) AS per_perecentile
, (sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, 0)) - sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, 0))) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, 0)) AS tb_perecentile
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, NULL)) AS curr_perecentile_25
, sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, NULL)) AS per_perecentile_25
, (sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, 0)) - sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, 0))) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, 0)) AS tb_perecentile_25
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, NULL)) AS curr_perecentile_75
, sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, NULL)) AS per_perecentile_75
, (sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, 0)) - sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, 0))) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, 0)) AS tb_perecentile_75
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg < 5000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_0_5
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 5 * 1000
AND every_avg < 10 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_5_10
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 10 * 1000
AND every_avg < 15 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_10_15
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 15 * 1000
AND every_avg < 20 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_15_20
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 20 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_20
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg < 5000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_0_5_ratio
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 5 * 1000
AND every_avg < 10 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_5_10_ratio
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 10 * 1000
AND every_avg < 15 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_10_15_ratio
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 15 * 1000
AND every_avg < 20 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_15_20_ratio
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 20 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_20_ratio
FROM (
SELECT curr_pre, column1, every_avg, rn, ratio
, max(rn) OVER (PARTITION BY curr_pre ORDER BY every_avg DESC) AS max_rn
FROM (
SELECT curr_pre, column1
, sum(ratio) / count(DISTINCT column2) AS ratio
, sum((column107 + ifnull(if(人员分类 = '教师'
AND t_base.company_desc IN ('北京学校', '国际教育北京中心'), column102, c_86), 0)) * ratio) / sum(ratio) AS every_avg
, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY curr_pre ORDER BY sum((column107 + ifnull(if(人员分类 = '教师'
AND t_base.company_desc IN ('北京学校', '国际教育北京中心'), column102, c_86), 0)) * ratio) / sum(ratio)) AS rn
FROM (
SELECT base.*, wd.org_type_name, wd.org_size_name_sy -- 机构类型
, wd.org_size_name_gm -- 板块
, wd.org_id_name_one -- 规模
, wd.ehr_org_name AS company_desc
, CASE
WHEN topcomanydescr = '集团总公司' THEN '集团总公司'
WHEN topcomanydescr = '前途出国' THEN '前途出国'
ELSE '其他'
END AS "业务分类"
, CASE
WHEN xdf_code_descr1_lv3 = '人员挂靠' THEN '挂靠'
WHEN xdf_code_descr1_lv3 = '运营' THEN '运营'
ELSE '其他'
END AS "人员分类"
, CASE
WHEN xdf_code_descr1_lv3 = '咨询顾问' THEN '咨询顾问'
ELSE '其他'
END AS "人员分类下钻", 1 AS 项目
, if(t_px.px IS NULL, 999, t_px.px) AS px
, if(t_px_sy.px IS NULL, 999, t_px_sy.px) AS px_sy
, if(t_px_gm.px IS NULL, 999, t_px_gm.px) AS px_gm
FROM (
SELECT base.*, ry.*, '0' AS curr_pre, line.business_line
, ifnull(line.ratio, 1) AS ratio, bonus.c_86
FROM finance_all_info_orc_base base
JOIN (
SELECT *
FROM ry
WHERE flag = '0'
) ry
ON base.column2 = ry.xdf_year_month
AND base.column1 = ry.emplid
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT *
FROM bonus
WHERE flag = '0'
) bonus
ON ry.xdf_year_month = bonus.monthid
AND ry.emplid = bonus.column1
LEFT JOIN line
ON ry.emplid = line.emplid
AND ry.xdf_year_month = line.month
UNION ALL
SELECT base.*, ry.*, '1' AS curr_pre, line.business_line
, ifnull(line.ratio, 1) AS ratio, bonus.c_86
FROM finance_all_info_orc_base base
JOIN (
SELECT *
FROM ry
WHERE flag = '1'
) ry
ON base.column2 = ry.xdf_year_month
AND base.column1 = ry.emplid
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT *
FROM bonus
WHERE flag = '1'
) bonus
ON ry.xdf_year_month = bonus.monthid
AND ry.emplid = bonus.column1
LEFT JOIN line
ON ry.emplid = line.emplid
AND ry.xdf_year_month = line.month
) base
JOIN wd ON base.company = wd.ehr_org_id
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT name, px
FROM dim_ehr_all_dimension_dict
WHERE type = '6'
) t_px
ON wd.org_id_name_one = t_px.name
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT name, px
FROM dim_ehr_all_dimension_dict
WHERE type = '7'
) t_px_sy
ON wd.org_size_name_sy = t_px_sy.name
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT name, px
FROM dim_ehr_all_dimension_dict
WHERE type = '7'
) t_px_gm
ON wd.org_size_name_gm = t_px_gm.name
) t_base
WHERE 1 = 1
AND t_base.人员分类下钻 NOT IN ('机构中高管', '总公司高管')
GROUP BY curr_pre, column1
) t_base
) t_base -- 机构类型合计
UNION ALL
SELECT org_type_name, '合计' AS org_size_name_sy, '合计' AS org_size_name_gm, '合计' AS org_id_name_one, '合计' AS company
, '合计' AS 业务分类, '合计' AS 项目, '合计' AS xdf_deptshort1
, CASE
WHEN org_type_name = '培训学校' THEN 2
WHEN org_type_name = '产业机构' THEN 3
WHEN org_type_name = '总公司' THEN 4
ELSE 5
END AS px_jglx, 0 AS px_sy, 0 AS px_gm, 0 AS px, 0 AS px_ywfl
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, 0)) AS curr_avg
, sum(if(curr_pre = '1', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1', ratio, 0)) AS pre_avg
, (sum(if(curr_pre = '0', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, 0)) - sum(if(curr_pre = '1', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1', ratio, 0))) / (sum(if(curr_pre = '1', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1', ratio, 0))) AS tb_avg
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, NULL)) AS curr_perecentile
, sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, NULL)) AS per_perecentile
, (sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, 0)) - sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, 0))) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, 0)) AS tb_perecentile
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, NULL)) AS curr_perecentile_25
, sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, NULL)) AS per_perecentile_25
, (sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, 0)) - sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, 0))) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, 0)) AS tb_perecentile_25
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, NULL)) AS curr_perecentile_75
, sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, NULL)) AS per_perecentile_75
, (sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, 0)) - sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, 0))) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, 0)) AS tb_perecentile_75
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg < 5000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_0_5
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 5 * 1000
AND every_avg < 10 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_5_10
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 10 * 1000
AND every_avg < 15 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_10_15
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 15 * 1000
AND every_avg < 20 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_15_20
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 20 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_20
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg < 5000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_0_5_ratio
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 5 * 1000
AND every_avg < 10 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_5_10_ratio
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 10 * 1000
AND every_avg < 15 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_10_15_ratio
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 15 * 1000
AND every_avg < 20 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_15_20_ratio
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 20 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_20_ratio
FROM (
SELECT org_type_name, curr_pre -- 机构类型
, column1, every_avg, rn, ratio
, max(rn) OVER (PARTITION BY org_type_name, curr_pre ORDER BY every_avg DESC) AS max_rn
FROM (
SELECT org_type_name, curr_pre -- 机构类型
, column1, sum(ratio) / count(DISTINCT column2) AS ratio
, sum((column107 + ifnull(if(人员分类 = '教师'
AND t_base.company_desc IN ('北京学校', '国际教育北京中心'), column102, c_86), 0)) * ratio) / sum(ratio) AS every_avg
, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY org_type_name, curr_pre ORDER BY sum((column107 + ifnull(if(人员分类 = '教师'
AND t_base.company_desc IN ('北京学校', '国际教育北京中心'), column102, c_86), 0)) * ratio) / sum(ratio)) AS rn
FROM (
SELECT base.*, wd.org_type_name, wd.org_size_name_sy -- 机构类型
, wd.org_size_name_gm -- 板块
, wd.org_id_name_one -- 规模
, wd.ehr_org_name AS company_desc
, CASE
WHEN topcomanydescr = '集团总公司' THEN '集团总公司'
WHEN topcomanydescr = '前途出国' THEN '前途出国'
ELSE '其他'
END AS "业务分类"
, CASE
WHEN xdf_code_descr1_lv3 = '人员挂靠' THEN '挂靠'
WHEN xdf_code_descr1_lv3 = '运营' THEN '运营'
ELSE '其他'
END AS "人员分类"
, CASE
WHEN xdf_code_descr1_lv3 = '咨询顾问' THEN '咨询顾问'
ELSE '其他'
END AS "人员分类下钻", 1 AS 项目
, if(t_px.px IS NULL, 999, t_px.px) AS px
, if(t_px_sy.px IS NULL, 999, t_px_sy.px) AS px_sy
, if(t_px_gm.px IS NULL, 999, t_px_gm.px) AS px_gm
FROM (
SELECT base.*, ry.*, '0' AS curr_pre, line.business_line
, ifnull(line.ratio, 1) AS ratio, bonus.c_86
FROM finance_all_info_orc_base base
JOIN (
SELECT *
FROM ry
WHERE flag = '0'
) ry
ON base.column2 = ry.xdf_year_month
AND base.column1 = ry.emplid
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT *
FROM bonus
WHERE flag = '0'
) bonus
ON ry.xdf_year_month = bonus.monthid
AND ry.emplid = bonus.column1
LEFT JOIN line
ON ry.emplid = line.emplid
AND ry.xdf_year_month = line.month
UNION ALL
SELECT base.*, ry.*, '1' AS curr_pre, line.business_line
, ifnull(line.ratio, 1) AS ratio, bonus.c_86
FROM finance_all_info_orc_base base
JOIN (
SELECT *
FROM ry
WHERE flag = '1'
) ry
ON base.column2 = ry.xdf_year_month
AND base.column1 = ry.emplid
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT *
FROM bonus
WHERE flag = '1'
) bonus
ON ry.xdf_year_month = bonus.monthid
AND ry.emplid = bonus.column1
LEFT JOIN line
ON ry.emplid = line.emplid
AND ry.xdf_year_month = line.month
) base
JOIN wd ON base.company = wd.ehr_org_id
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT name, px
FROM dim_ehr_all_dimension_dict
WHERE type = '6'
) t_px
ON wd.org_id_name_one = t_px.name
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT name, px
FROM dim_ehr_all_dimension_dict
WHERE type = '7'
) t_px_sy
ON wd.org_size_name_sy = t_px_sy.name
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT name, px
FROM dim_ehr_all_dimension_dict
WHERE type = '7'
) t_px_gm
ON wd.org_size_name_gm = t_px_gm.name
) t_base
WHERE 1 = 1
AND t_base.人员分类下钻 NOT IN ('机构中高管', '总公司高管')
GROUP BY org_type_name -- 机构类型
, curr_pre, column1
) t_base
) t_base
GROUP BY org_type_name
UNION ALL
-- 省域合计
SELECT org_type_name, org_size_name_sy -- 机构类型
, '合计' AS org_size_name_gm, '合计' AS org_id_name_one, '合计' AS company, '合计' AS 业务分类, '合计' AS 项目
, '合计' AS xdf_deptshort1
, CASE
WHEN org_type_name = '培训学校' THEN 2
WHEN org_type_name = '产业机构' THEN 3
WHEN org_type_name = '总公司' THEN 4
ELSE 5
END AS px_jglx, px_sy, 0 AS px_gm, 0 AS px, 0 AS px_ywfl
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, 0)) AS curr_avg
, sum(if(curr_pre = '1', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1', ratio, 0)) AS pre_avg
, (sum(if(curr_pre = '0', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, 0)) - sum(if(curr_pre = '1', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1', ratio, 0))) / (sum(if(curr_pre = '1', every_avg * ratio, 0)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1', ratio, 0))) AS tb_avg
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, NULL)) AS curr_perecentile
, sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, NULL)) AS per_perecentile
, (sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, 0)) - sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, 0))) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = if(max_rn % 2 <> 0, max_rn + 1, max_rn) / 2, every_avg, 0)) AS tb_perecentile
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, NULL)) AS curr_perecentile_25
, sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, NULL)) AS per_perecentile_25
, (sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, 0)) - sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, 0))) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 4), every_avg, 0)) AS tb_perecentile_25
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, NULL)) AS curr_perecentile_75
, sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, NULL)) AS per_perecentile_75
, (sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, 0)) - sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, 0))) / sum(if(curr_pre = '1'
AND rn = ceiling(max_rn / 1.333333), every_avg, 0)) AS tb_perecentile_75
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg < 5000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_0_5
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 5 * 1000
AND every_avg < 10 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_5_10
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 10 * 1000
AND every_avg < 15 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_10_15
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 15 * 1000
AND every_avg < 20 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_15_20
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 20 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_20
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg < 5000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_0_5_ratio
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 5 * 1000
AND every_avg < 10 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_5_10_ratio
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 10 * 1000
AND every_avg < 15 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_10_15_ratio
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 15 * 1000
AND every_avg < 20 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_15_20_ratio
, sum(if(curr_pre = '0'
AND every_avg >= 20 * 1000, ratio, NULL)) / sum(if(curr_pre = '0', ratio, NULL)) AS all_people_20_ratio
FROM (
SELECT org_type_name, org_size_name_sy -- 机构类型
, curr_pre -- 板块
, px_sy, column1, ratio, every_avg, rn
, max(rn) OVER (PARTITION BY org_type_name, org_size_name_sy, curr_pre ORDER BY every_avg DESC) AS max_rn
FROM (
SELECT org_type_name, org_size_name_sy -- 机构类型
, curr_pre -- 板块
, px_sy, column1
, sum(ratio) / count(DISTINCT column2) AS ratio
, sum((column107 + ifnull(if(人员分类 = '教师'
AND t_base.company_desc IN ('北京学校', '国际教育北京中心'), column102, c_86), 0)) * ratio) / sum(ratio) AS every_avg
, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY org_type_name, org_size_name_sy, curr_pre ORDER BY sum((column107 + ifnull(if(人员分类 = '教师'
AND t_base.company_desc IN ('北京学校', '国际教育北京中心'), column102, c_86), 0)) * ratio) / sum(ratio)) AS rn
FROM (
SELECT base.*, wd.org_type_name, wd.org_size_name_sy -- 机构类型
, wd.org_size_name_gm -- 板块
, wd.org_id_name_one -- 规模
, wd.ehr_org_name AS company_desc
, CASE
WHEN topcomanydescr = '集团总公司' THEN '集团总公司'
WHEN topcomanydescr = '前途出国' THEN '前途出国'
ELSE '其他'
END AS "业务分类"
, CASE
WHEN xdf_code_descr1_lv3 = '人员挂靠' THEN '挂靠'
WHEN xdf_code_descr1_lv3 = '运营' THEN '运营'
ELSE '其他'
END AS "人员分类"
, CASE
WHEN xdf_code_descr1_lv3 = '咨询顾问' THEN '咨询顾问'
ELSE '其他'
END AS "人员分类下钻", 1 AS 项目
, if(t_px.px IS NULL, 999, t_px.px) AS px
, if(t_px_sy.px IS NULL, 999, t_px_sy.px) AS px_sy
, if(t_px_gm.px IS NULL, 999, t_px_gm.px) AS px_gm
FROM (
SELECT base.*, ry.*, '0' AS curr_pre, line.business_line
, ifnull(line.ratio, 1) AS ratio, bonus.c_86
FROM finance_all_info_orc_base base
JOIN (
SELECT *
FROM ry
WHERE flag = '0'
) ry
ON base.column2 = ry.xdf_year_month
AND base.column1 = ry.emplid
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT *
FROM bonus
WHERE flag = '0'
) bonus
ON ry.xdf_year_month = bonus.monthid
AND ry.emplid = bonus.column1
LEFT JOIN line
ON ry.emplid = line.emplid
AND ry.xdf_year_month = line.month
UNION ALL
SELECT base.*, ry.*, '1' AS curr_pre, line.business_line
, ifnull(line.ratio, 1) AS ratio, bonus.c_86
FROM finance_all_info_orc_base base
JOIN (
SELECT *
FROM ry
WHERE flag = '1'
) ry
ON base.column2 = ry.xdf_year_month
AND base.column1 = ry.emplid
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT *
FROM bonus
WHERE flag = '1'
) bonus
ON ry.xdf_year_month = bonus.monthid
AND ry.emplid = bonus.column1
LEFT JOIN line
ON ry.emplid = line.emplid
AND ry.xdf_year_month = line.month
) base
JOIN wd ON base.company = wd.ehr_org_id
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT name, px
FROM dim_ehr_all_dimension_dict
WHERE type = '6'
) t_px
ON wd.org_id_name_one = t_px.name
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT name, px
FROM dim_ehr_all_dimension_dict
WHERE type = '7'
) t_px_sy
ON wd.org_size_name_sy = t_px_sy.name
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT name, px
FROM dim_ehr_all_dimension_dict
WHERE type = '7'
) t_px_gm
ON wd.org_size_name_gm = t_px_gm.name
) t_base
WHERE 1 = 1
AND t_base.人员分类下钻 NOT IN ('机构中高管', '总公司高管')
GROUP BY org_type_name -- 机构类型
, org_size_name_sy -- 板块
, curr_pre, px_sy, column1
) t_base
) t_base
GROUP BY org_type_name -- 机构类型
, org_size_name_sy -- 板块
, px_sy
) t_base
ORDER BY px_jglx, px_sy, px_gm, px
